name: Shenzhen Bauing Construction Holding Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Shenzhen Bauing Construction Holding Group Co., Ltd. engages in the construction and integrated building decoration engineering businesses in China. The company undertakes decoration engineering, curtain wall and steel structure engineering, integrated intelligent engineering, fire protection engineering in building design, mechanical and electrical installation engineering, security technology engineering, metal window and door installation, exhibition engineering, and medical equipment engineering works. It serves real estate clients, government agencies, large-scale enterprises, multinational corporations, upscale hotels, and other clients. The company was founded in 2001 and is based in Shenzhen, China.
